movie.original_title: The Life and Death of Colonel Blimp
movie.overview: General Candy, who's overseeing an English squad in 1943, is a veteran leader who doesn't have the respect of the men he's training and is considered out-of-touch with what's needed to win the war. But it wasn't always this way. Flashing back to his early career in the Boer War and World War I, we see a dashing young officer whose life has been shaped by three different women, and by a lasting friendship with a German soldier.
movie.tagline: An unforgettable story of forty gallant years.
movie.title: The Life and Death of Colonel Blimp

cast.name: Deborah Kerr
cast.character: Edith Hunter / Barbara Wynne / Angela "Johnny" Cannon
